PUH-BrianMartell-Your new IC-2 Progress Note (May 14, 2026) takes one of the four open intermediate calculations from the Q3 KKS Methodological Note and executes the parts that can be done by hand/known results. Key Achievements: •  Identified the specific Dirac cohomology K-types for the three special spherical E₈ representations in Barbasch-Wong 2026 (V_K(ρ) for model + trivial; V_K([4,0,0,0,0,4,1,1]) for the unipotent one), all with multiplicity 16. •  Used the adjoint branching 248 = (8,1) + (1,78) + (3,27) + (3-bar,27-bar) plus dimensional arguments to show non-trivial SU(3) content → weak form of S1’ verified. •  Established the canonical Z₃ center grading on any SU(3) × E₆ branching (Result 3). This directly links to T155v2 sector phases and provides the structural object that the reflection operator R (from IC-1) must act on.
